name: ascii-canvas
description: A production-grade ASCII diagram editor built with Rust and WebAssembly
author: Anomaly

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/ascii_canvas.wasm --out-dir web/pkg --target web && wasm-opt --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext -O3 web/pkg/ascii_canvas_bg.wasm -o web/pkg/ascii_canvas_bg.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:web
scripts.netlify:build: rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && cargo install wasm-bindgen-cli --version 0.2.118 && npm i -g wasm-opt && npm ci && cd web && npm ci && cd .. && npm run build && npm run check-size
scripts.check-size: size=$(stat -c%s web/pkg/ascii_canvas_bg.wasm); if [ $size -gt 1572864 ]; then echo "WASM size $size exceeds 1.5MB limit"; exit 1; else echo "WASM size $size is within budget"; fi
